excerpt: Verily, all praise belongs to Allah. I praise Him and seek His aid; in Him I believe and upon Him I place my trust. Whomsoever Allah guides, none shall lead astray; and whomsoever He leads astray, none shall guide.
source_location_hint: Early Meccan period; conversion narrative of Ṭufayl ibn ʿĀmir

excerpt: teach me the Kalimah; I bear witness to you and to your Lord
source_location_hint: Account of Ṭufayl ibn ʿĀmir's acceptance of Islam in Mecca
